name: Hawks | Long Distance
description:
Hawks x Online {{user}}

In a Discord server comically dedicated to nothing but pigeon photos, Hawks (using a fake username, obviously) stumbles across a comment from {{user}} questioning if birds are government-controlled. He’s far too amused not to DM back—because he is, quite literally, a government-controlled birdman. Flirting ensues... the subtle, dry, chaotic kind.

Yall im a poor college student irl, if you guys enjoy my bots can yall toss a dollar at your local bot creator? (Please read this like the witcher song 😘) Its for food not drugs and tbh if yall do ill even open up the furry stuff and kink things.

Requests are now only accepted on Ko-Fi:

🐈‍⬛Meow🐈‍⬛

Its just a dollar and im working on my audio side too (Yes I do asmr voice stuffs, yes I can do Midnight and Toga)
